name: RIC Excise Tax Exemption for Tax-Exempt Shareholders

eligibility.description: Available to RICs where 100% of ownership is held by qualified pension trusts, insurance company variable accounts, or other specific tax-exempt entities.

description: Exempts a Regulated Investment Company (RIC) from the 4% excise tax on undistributed income if all shareholders are specific tax-exempt entities (e.g., 401(a) trusts or segregated asset accounts of life insurance companies).
